# Newsletter footer HDP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->

## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to hotel details page at stayforlong.com
2. Click on exclusive offers section
3. Scroll down the page
4. Click on email input field
5. Click Subscribe button
6. Enter email 'hilda.escalona@stayforlong.com'
7. Click Subscribe button
8. Verify thank you message appears
